title: Family Declaration
text: I, {{ client.full_name | name }}, make this declaration regarding my family. {% if has_spouse %}I am married to {{ spouse.full_name | name }}.{% else %}I am not married.{% endif %}{% if has_children %} My children are: {% for child in children %}{{ child.full_name | name }}{% if not loop.last %}; {% endif %}{% endfor %}.{% endif %}
